name: Applicability Boundary review for Validity Conditions and Controlled Comparison Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The staged applicability facets keep Nguyen and Cao under formative-feedback/instructional support, Cao et al. and Wu et al. under research/development, and SMART under research/development plus calibration/development. None of the records are mapped as high-stakes operational validation.

findings.claim_or_issue: The staged records map teacher-learning, instructional-planning, programming simulation, and item-development evidence to controlled low/no-consequence or development-facing facets.
findings.why_it_matters: Without this boundary, research/development realism evidence could be misread as high-stakes scoring validation evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the current assessment_purpose, decision_consequence, operational_use, and limitations fields.
